title: AG-UI Protocol
description: 33 typed event categories via ag_ui_ex Hex package. SSE transport, compile-time EventType constants. Full ag_ui_ex dependency — community Elixir SDK contributed to the AG-UI open protocol ecosystem.

title: Event Router
description: Central dispatch: routes AG-UI events to AgentRegistry, FormationStore, Dashboard, Metrics. Compile-time module attributes for pattern matching. Fan-out via PubSub to all subscribed LiveViews.

title: Event Stream
description: Emit and retrieve events. PubSub broadcast to all subscribers. Time-ordered ETS storage with sequence numbers. Clear/filter operations. 12 ExUnit tests covering emit, subscribe, replay, and filter paths.

title: Hook Bridge
description: Translates legacy register/heartbeat/notify into AG-UI event types (RUN_STARTED, STEP_*, TOOL_CALL_*). Zero-config backward compatibility — existing hook scripts gain AG-UI semantics without modification.

title: State Manager
description: Per-agent versioned state with JSON Patch delta emission (STATE_SNAPSHOT / STATE_DELTA). ETS-backed, microsecond reads. Supports get_state/2, put_state/3, apply_delta/3 operations.

title: Agent Registry
description: Lifecycle tracking for all agents. Explicit squadron/swarm/cluster/individual hierarchy. Fire-and-forget registration at POST /api/register. 30s heartbeat, 90s stale threshold. ETS-backed with O(1) lookups.

title: Formation Model
description: Hierarchical agent coordination via FormationStore GenServer. Formation → Squadron → Swarm → Agent → Task hierarchy. Persists completed formations for post-mortem. POST /api/v2/formations with deep-link support.

title: Metrics Collector
description: Per-agent, per-project token economics. 12 x 5-min buckets, full last-hour time-series. GET /api/telemetry returns started/completed/failed/active_now summary. Feeds CCEMAgent AreaMark + LineMark chart.

title: Chat Store
description: Scoped message persistence via ChatStore GenServer. AG-UI TEXT_MESSAGE_START/CONTENT/END event integration. PubSub real-time broadcast. 27 ExUnit tests covering create, list, scope, and clear operations.

title: 19+ LiveView Dashboards
description: Real-time Phoenix LiveView pages: agents, formations, analytics, health, tasks, scanner, actions, skills, notifications, AG-UI events, conversations, ports, UPM Kanban, inspector chat, CCEM overview, docs, showcase. All subscribe to PubSub channels for sub-second updates.

title: Sidebar Navigation
description: Unified sidebar across all 19+ views. Dual-section dynamic nav: system tools and project sections. Active page highlighting with icon labels. UPM nav item injected. Dynamic header branding per section.

title: Notification Panel
description: Tabbed categories with toast overlays. Wave completion toasts with deep-link to formation. Read/unread tracking. APM hook support via POST /api/notify. Richer notification cards with formation context and action buttons.

title: Health Check System
description: HealthCheckRunner with 15-second auto-refresh. Overall status badge aggregating server, APM, and service health. Displayed in sidebar and /health LiveView. Used by CCEMAgent EnvironmentMonitor for menu bar status.

title: AG-UI Dashboard
description: Live AG-UI event viewer at /ag-ui. State inspector with per-agent versioned state display. Protocol stats: event counts by type, rate per minute. SSE streaming via EventStream PubSub. Event type filter using EventType.all/0.

title: Conversation Monitor
description: Real-time conversation tracking across scopes via ChatStore. Message history viewer with TEXT_MESSAGE event replay. Scoped by session, project, or formation. ActivityTracker inference drives ACTIVITY_SNAPSHOT events.

title: CCEMAgent
description: Native macOS menubar companion. Swift/AppKit @Observable architecture. Telemetry AreaMark + LineMark chart (48px). Start/Stop APM via APMServerManager. APMClient v2 with configurable port + SSE. Mini-chat view and multi-server dynamic port config.

title: Skill Health Monitor
description: SkillsRegistryStore GenServer with ETS health scoring cache. Three-tier health view (green/yellow/red). Audit engine via ActionEngine: fix_skill_frontmatter, complete_skill_description, add_skill_triggers, backfill_project_memory. Audit All and individual Fix buttons in /skills LiveView.

title: Project Scanner
description: Auto-discovery of developer directories for projects, stacks, active ports, hooks, MCPs, CLAUDE.md sections. scan_claude_native/1 extracts session state. Configurable scan path via /scanner LiveView. 3s auto-refresh.

title: Background Task Manager
description: BackgroundTasksStore GenServer tracks Claude Code background tasks: name, definition, invoking_process, agent_name, log_path, runtime_ms. PubSub broadcasts on status change. GET /tasks/:id/logs, POST /tasks/:id/stop. 5s auto-refresh in /tasks LiveView.

title: Action Engine
description: ActionEngine GenServer with extensible action catalog: update_hooks, add_memory_pointer, backfill_apm_config, analyze_project, discover_migrate_showcases, register_all_ports, update_port_namespace, analyze_port_assignment, smart_reassign_ports. Async via Task.start/1. Run modal in /actions LiveView.

title: UAT Testing Panel
description: 14 test cases across 6 categories exercising the live AG-UI subsystem in-browser. Tests agent registration, event routing, state management, hook bridge translation, formation tracking, and metrics collection. Results displayed per test with pass/fail and latency.

title: Showcase Generator
description: IP-safe architecture diagrams via ShowcaseDataStore. C4 abstraction levels with redaction engine. Pure SVG diagram engine (replaced Mermaid) — WCAG AA, anime.js node-level animations. LiveView-integrated at /showcase. ShowcaseEngine memory leak fixed (global listener audit).

title: Cross-Platform Installer
description: Modular install.sh with libs: ui, detect, deps, build, hooks, service. Supports --prefix, --skip-*, --dry-run, --yes flags. User-level services only (no sudo). Service templates in installer/services/. Generates launchd plist with io.pegues.agent-j.labs reverse-DNS identifier.

title: UPM Orchestration
description: End-to-end orchestration: /upm plan → /upm build → /upm verify → /upm ship. Formation deployment with squadron/swarm/agent hierarchy. Plane PM bidirectional sync. 22 REST endpoints at /api/upm/*. Wave-gated execution with TypeScript/compile gates. AG-UI event emission for real-time progress. CCEM APM toast notifications at every lifecycle point.

title: OpenAPI 3.0.3 Spec
description: 103+ endpoints across 25 categories. Canonical at GET /api/v2/openapi.json. Scalar interactive docs at /api/docs. Validated by integration tests. Formation, UPM, AG-UI, skills, tasks, scanner, actions, ports, auth, widgets, dashboard, plugins, security all documented. Used as OpenAPI-first validation gate after APM startup.

title: Port Management
description: PortsLive intelligence dashboard with conflict visualization and utilization heatmap. ActionEngine port actions: register_all_ports, update_port_namespace, analyze_port_assignment, smart_reassign_ports. Project-scoped assignment, namespace tracking, conflict detection. REST at /api/v2/ports.

title: Approval Gates
description: Formation-level approval workflow. POST /api/v2/approvals/request with approve/reject. Integrates with AG-UI approval event types. Wave-gate blocking until approval received. Used by UPM ship step to require human confirmation before deployment.

title: 5-Level Formation Graph
description: Full D3.js formation tree at /formation: Formation → Squadron → Swarm → Cluster → Agent, 5 nesting levels. Wave swim lanes as background bands grouped by wave_number. Agent type badges (ORCH/LEAD/SWM/CLU) in node top-right. Node color by type (indigo/sky/emerald/violet/slate). Sub-labels show story_id and work_item_title. Inspector panel with all 16 metadata fields on click.

title: Screenshot Skill
description: /screenshot skill handles macOS U+202F narrow no-break space in HEIC filenames via Python os.listdir(). Subcommands: default (last screenshot), last N / last 1h, incremental (skip already-processed), setup (project/user scoped config), status. Auto-converts HEIC→PNG via sips. Processed state persisted to screenshot-processed.json for incremental sessions.

title: Skill Dependency Graph
description: Visualized skill ecosystem for CCEM: /idea → /ralph → /upm → /formation → /deploy:agents-v2 → /live-integration-testing. /ccem-apm as telemetry hub receiving register/heartbeat/event from all agents. /showcase consuming from APM: agent count, formation tree (5 levels), UPM phase, AG-UI event stream. Data flow: prd.json → formation config → APM telemetry → showcase display.

title: Agent Activity Log
description: AgentActivityLog GenServer ring buffer (200 events) subscribing to lifecycle/tool/thinking/text EventBus topics. PubSub broadcast on apm:activity_log. REST at GET /api/agents/activity-log.

title: Showcase Activity Tab
description: D3.js force-directed graph showing live agent status-colored nodes with anime.js pulse rings for active agents. Collapsible 30-event action log pull-down with type badges.

title: Showcase Feature Inspector
description: Right-column contextual panel activated by clicking any feature card. Shows description, acceptance criteria checklist, related agents filtered by story_id, timing rows, status mini-timeline.

title: Showcase Template System
description: TEMPLATES registry with engine (default 3-col) and formation layouts. applyTemplate(id) dispatch switchable via showcase:template-changed AG-UI event.

title: Project Dropdown UX
description: Sectioned into Active (check-circle), Recently Active (clock, 30-day window), and collapsible Show N other toggle. categorize_projects/2 helper recomputes on config reload.

title: UpmApiController
description: Domain controller extracted from ApiController for UPM execution tracking: upm_register, upm_agent, upm_event, upm_status. API routes delegated at /api/upm/*.

title: FormationApiController
description: Domain controller for formation CRUD: list, get, create, update, agents via UpmStore + AgentRegistry. Routes added: /api/formations and /api/formations/{id}/agents.

title: ShowcaseApiController
description: Domain controller for showcase data REST API: index, show, reload via ShowcaseDataStore. Routes: /api/showcase and /api/showcase/{project}/reload.

title: AgentPanel Component
description: Functional component extracted from DashboardLive Agent Fleet section. Includes tier/status/agent_type badges and filter support. Reduces DashboardLive from 1923 to 1765 lines.

title: PortPanel Component
description: Functional component extracted from DashboardLive Ports tab. Includes clash alerts, remediation display, project port configs, and badge helpers.

title: LiveView Integration Tests
description: 14 ExUnit integration tests: 8 for DashboardLive (AgentPanel + PortPanel component integration) and 6 for ShowcaseLive (nil-session regression + mount/render coverage).

title: Skills WCAG 2.1 AA Compliance
description: Full WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for /skills: skip link, ARIA landmarks (main, complementary, banner), tablist/tab/tabpanel roles, aria-live polite for search announcements, focus management.

title: Skills Fix Wizard
description: 4-step guided Fix Wizard (:diagnose → :select → :preview → :done) replacing fire-and-forget Fix button. MapSet-backed repair type selection. Invokes ActionEngine for frontmatter, description, and trigger repairs.

title: Skills Card Grid + Slide-in Drawer + Session Timeline + AG-UI Health
description: Card grid with SVG health-ring indicator, tier badges, trigger pills. Slide-in detail drawer with keyboard focus trap. Session tab with vertical invocation timeline sorted by last_seen. AG-UI tab summary stats row (Connected/Degraded/Broken) with per-skill health dot + colored borders.

title: Authorization Gate
description: 3-layer enforcement: Agent → AuthorizationGate → ToolExecution. Central GenServer evaluates policy, issues single-use atk_ tokens with SHA-256 param binding, delegates to existing ApprovalGate for escalation. Integrates with AG-UI EventBus for CUSTOM auth events.

title: Policy Engine
description: Stateless risk evaluation module. Default tool risk map (Read=none, Write=medium, Bash=high). Destructive command detection via regex. Data boundary enforcement, bulk operation checks, trust ceiling validation. Returns PolicyDecision with allow/deny/escalate.

title: Token + Session + Rate Limiter
description: TokenStore GenServer with ETS: atk_ prefix tokens, 60s TTL, 10s sweep, atomic validate-and-consume. SessionStore with dual-indexed ETS (session_id + user_id), 15-min TTL, monotonic trust degradation. RateLimiter with sliding window per {user, tool}.

title: Trust & Context Tracking
description: ContextTracker GenServer tracks provenance of information flowing through agent context. Monotonic trust degradation: once untrusted content enters, trust ceiling can never rise within that session. 200-event ring buffer per session.

title: Memory Gate + Data Redaction
description: MemoryGate controls persistence authorization with 7 prohibited patterns (API keys, PEM, JWT, SSH, OAuth, AWS, conn strings). RedactionEngine applies 7 regex patterns (SSN, CC, email, phone, IP, AWS key, API key) with auto/manual/none modes.

title: Authorization Dashboard + Routing Graph
description: AuthorizationLive: 4-tab dashboard (Overview/Sessions/Audit/Policies) with live PubSub updates, risk badges, trust indicators. RoutingLive: D3.js force-directed auth flow graph with approval gate diamonds, audit trail side panel.

title: Agent Lifecycle State Machine
description: Pure functional state machine: PENDING→AUTHORIZED→RUNNING→COMPLETING→COMPLETED/FAILED/TIMED_OUT. Authorization checkpoint between PENDING and AUTHORIZED requires valid token. Edge list export for D3.js visualization.

title: AgentLock Hooks + CCEMAgent Auth
description: PreToolUse hook: POST /api/v2/auth/authorize, store token, 3s timeout, fail-open. PostToolUse hook: consume token, fire-and-forget. Context hook: trust tracking for Write/Edit/WebFetch. CCEMAgent: AuthorizationModels.swift, authorization section in MenuBarView.

title: Notification Buffer Cap + Grouped View
description: Notification ring buffer expanded from 200 to 2,000 events — supports high-frequency agentic formations without losing audit trail. Grouped view UI collapses notifications by category (lifecycle/auth/formation/task/tool/system) with per-group expand/collapse. derive_category/1 infers group from notification type field.

title: Native Conversation Monitor
description: SessionManager multi-path scan covers both APM session files and Claude Code JSONL conversation logs (~/.claude/projects/*/*.jsonl). ConversationMonitorLive reuses SessionManager.list_sessions/0 as single source of truth. source: :claude_native badge distinguishes native Claude Code sessions from APM-registered agents.

title: Agent Identity Taxonomy
description: Structured agent identity fields added to AgentRegistry: agent_name (human-readable label), agent_type (normalized enum: orchestrator|squadron_lead|swarm_agent|cluster_agent|individual|persistent_service|quality_agent|unknown), agent_definition (instance purpose). normalize_agent_type/1 validates and coerces raw strings. NamespaceResolver uses agent_name as primary display label when available.

title: Formation Graph TB Layout + Namespace Bounding
description: Fourth formation layout mode: TB (top-to-bottom with session columns). Namespace-scoped bounding rectangles rendered behind node clusters for visual grouping. Auto-collapse: namespaces with >50 nodes reduce to summary node. ?scope= URL param for namespace filtering. ?layout=tb param selects TB mode.

title: Modular Sidebar + Plugin/Integration Nav
description: Sidebar reorganized into 5 fixed sections: CORE, AUTHORIZATION, PLUGINS (dynamic), INTEGRATIONS (dynamic), SYSTEM. PluginBehaviour optional callbacks (nav_items/0, settings_path/0, plugin_live_module/0) allow plugins to inject nav items. IntegrationBehaviour optional callbacks (target_native_feature/0, required_plugin/0) wire integrations to native features. safe_list_plugins/0 and safe_list_integrations/0 guard against GenServer unavailability.

title: Persistent Plane-PM Align Agent
description: ApmV5.PlanePmAlign GenServer in supervision tree polls Plane API every 5 minutes. Broadcasts plane:sync PubSub on each sync cycle. Auto-registers with APM AgentRegistry using agent_type: persistent_service. REST: GET /api/v2/plane/sync-status (status, last_sync_at, next_sync_in_seconds, issues_synced), POST /api/v2/plane/sync (on-demand immediate sync).

title: Timeline Swim-Lane Redesign
description: SessionTimelineLive redesigned with category swim lanes: lifecycle, auth, formation, task, tool, system. Time window selector with presets (15m/30m/1h/6h/24h). Drill-down side panel opens on event selection with full payload viewer. Lanes are color-coded and independently scrollable.

title: AG-UI EventBus + A2A Router Scale-Up
description: EventBus replay buffer expanded 500 → 20,000 events for high-throughput formation monitoring. A2A Router history cap expanded 200 → 2,000 entries. Both changes support large formations (50+ agents) without replay loss. BackgroundTasksStore add/1 alias added for register_task/1 compatibility.

title: AgentLock Notification Grouping
description: v9.0.0 feature set: Agent descriptor mapping, execution context payloads, ApprovalQueue debounced notification grouping, ApprovalModal keyboard shortcuts, CCEMHelper grouped approval UI with focus management, ApprovalAuditLog GenServer, osascript notification fallback, and full integration test suite. Covers CP-56 through CP-63.

title: Security Native Types
description: v9.1.0 feature set: security_reminder_hook.py expanded with Bash command injection, WebFetch/WebSearch SSRF detection, Agent/Skill prompt injection advisory. hooks.json covers 8 native tool types. SecurityGuidancePlugin with :security plugin_scope, 4 actions (hook_status, scan_history, covered_tools, pattern_summary), and 41-test ExUnit suite. Covers CP-64 through CP-70.

title: Hooks Max-Payload v9
description: v9.1.1 hooks upgrade: all 9 hooks emit v9 payloads with session_id, project, working_dir, git_branch. Agent identity resolution chain in agentlock hooks. Memory write detection, skill invocation tracking, pattern heartbeat every 10 tool calls. Expanded tool mapping in agentlock_context. Notification audit trail in agentlock_post_tool. Session end summary with tool count and cleanup. Covers CP-71 through CP-80.

title: Coalesce v9.1.1 Skill Sync
description: All 20+ CCEM skills coalesced to v9.1.1: ccem-apm, apm-api-reference, apm-auth, apm-telemetry, formation, orchestrator, upm, ralph, ship, coalesce, doctor, elixir-architect, conversation-mgmt, live-all, showcase, idea, dev-vs-prod, safesecret, apm-usage. Double-verify regression + frontmatter validation. SkillsRegistry cache refreshed. Covers CP-81 through CP-92.

title: Dashboard Widgetization Engine
description: Widget config schema with editable, pinnable, supported_scopes, default_config, display_order. LayoutStore and WidgetConfigStore GenServers (ETS-backed). DashboardScopeEngine for pin/unpin scope source. DashboardLive scope PubSub wiring. WidgetEditPanelComponent, WidgetContainerComponent, DashboardGridComponent LiveComponents. CSS Grid 12-col layout with HTML5 drag-reorder. ContextPinDrillDownComponent, ProjectsWidget. 5 new API endpoints. 43-test integration suite. Covers CP-93 through CP-106.

title: Fleet Agentic Orchestration Architecture (FAOA)
description: Formal specification for multi-agent formation execution: hierarchy (Formation→Squadron→Swarm→Cluster→Agent), payload schemas for register/heartbeat/notify, sequential wave gating, compile gate patterns, and Quick Reference copy-paste curl blocks. Covers orchestrator role conventions, formation_id naming (fmt-YYYYMMDD-slug), and APM LiveView at /formation. Reference doc at .claude/fleet-agentic-orchestration-architecture.md.

title: AppVersion SSOT Module
description: ApmV5.AppVersion module replaces stale compile-time @app_version attributes with inline Application.spec(:apm_v5, :vsn) reads from the .app manifest sourced from mix.exs. Single source of truth pattern eliminates version drift between sidebar, footer, docs, and API responses. stdlib-backed (always loaded), no UndefinedFunctionError surface. Commits e51a67d (SSOT introduction), 5ececb6 (version freshness), e1614d7 (sidebar revert hardening). PR peguesj/ccem-apm#21, merge 3cc030e.

title: /conversations Pagination — 10x Payload Reduction
description: ConversationMonitorLive switched to Phoenix.LiveView stream/3 with stream_configure dom_id for map-based items. Payload reduced from 4MB to 420KB (~10x) on initial mount. page_window/2, apply_filter/2, refresh_conversations/2 helpers added for windowed pagination + PubSub state refresh. Fixes ArgumentError at mount/3 when stream items lack id key (CCEM-567). Commits 0cbd816 (stream_configure), 0f0b86a (Waves 7-9 helpers). PR peguesj/ccem-apm#21, merge 3cc030e.

title: Auth API Hardening — PolicyRulesStore + 8 Endpoints
description: PolicyRulesStore gains wildcard rule fallback with exact-match precedence and idempotent removal. 8 apm-auth skill-spec endpoints solidified: session/start, session/heartbeat, session/end, token/redeem, policies GET+POST, approvals/pending, approvals/:id/decide. Authorize response gains explicit decision field (allow|deny|escalate). 8-test PolicyRulesStore suite + 21-test auth controller suite (both tagged :govern_intelligence). CP-191. PR peguesj/ccem-apm#21, merge 3cc030e.

title: UI/UX Nav Redesign — 6-Section Sidebar Taxonomy
description: Sidebar reorganized into 6-section taxonomy with collapsible sections: Observe, Measure, Intelligence, Govern, Extend, Platform. Active page highlighting persists across section collapse. AgentLock approval popup suppression honors user dismissal across session. Sidebar SSOT wired to ApmV5.AppVersion for live version display. Commit e1614d7 (sidebar revert with hardening). PR peguesj/ccem-apm#21, merge 3cc030e.

title: Vectorize CCEM/APM knowledge
description: sqlite-vec/MiniLM-L6-v2 KB at .ssot/ccem.sqlite (242 chunks, 384-dim)

title: Nav inventory tree
description: Full router/sidebar tree at docs/sprint-v9.2.0/nav-tree.md — 62 routes, 6 nav groups

title: Feature graph with referential integrity
description: 42 features, 124 endpoints, 52 LiveViews, 10 plugins — md/mmd/json triple

title: Rewrite apm-api-reference skill
description: Auto-generated from openapi.snapshot.json — 113 paths grouped by 40 categories

title: Refactor page_layout.ex
description: Topbar now parent of sidebar+main+inspector row (v9.2.0 structural fix)

title: Bump SSOT version v9.1.3 → v9.2.0
description: CLAUDE.md + mix.exs aligned to v9.2.0

title: Propagate hooks v9.1.4 across projects
description: 116 of 142 .claude dirs synced; 27 opted-out

title: Skill drift audit + sweep
description: 6 skills bumped to v9.1.4: apm, apm-auth, ccem-apm, formation, orchestrator, specialize

title: v9.2.0 SSOT Confluence
description: Single Source of Truth confluence sprint: local sqlite-vec KB (242 chunks, fallback BLOB+cosine), OpenAPI snapshot (113 paths), 1-page KB.md synthesis, nav-tree inventory, referential-integrity feature graph, auto-generated apm-api-reference SKILL.md, page_layout.ex topbar restructure (full-width above sidebar/main/inspector), hook filesystem propagation across ~/Developer and ~/tools (112 projects), and 15-skill APM-touching sweep.

title: v9.3.0 Governance Foundation — wf-s3 work_item stories
description: Work-item story tracker landing in wave 7 of v9.3.0.

title: v9.3.0 — wf-s4 hierarchy compaction
description: Hierarchy compaction story landing in wave 7 of v9.3.0.

title: v9.3.0 — wf-s5 wave-coordination contract
description: Wave-coordination contract story landing in wave 7 of v9.3.0.

title: v9.3.0 — wf-s6 squadron retro
description: Squadron retro story landing in wave 7 of v9.3.0.

title: v9.3.0 — coord-c2 cross-squadron channel
description: Cross-squadron coordination channel; final wave 7 story.

title: v9.3.0 — Showcase IPC + daemon (parallel)
description: tooling:showcase-ipc Plane module; concurrent with v9.3.0 wave 7, not part of governance scope.

title: v11 clean-slate redesign — 5-section workflow IA
description: v11 Design Intake from Claude Design: 71 tokens, 36 components, 28 promoted, 2 gold-standard pages live (Dashboard + Fleet). 5-section workflow IA: Observe / Measure / Intelligence / Govern / Extend. PRs #24, #25, #26 in review. Source: design-intake/v11.0.0/from-designer/.

title: Icon sprite migration
description: 26+1 inline SVG icons consolidated into priv/static/images/apm-sprite.svg with <use href> references. Reduces DOM weight on dense LiveView pages. CP-327.

title: Live section e2e drift validation
description: 4/4 /live/* routes pass live-integration-testing browser drift checks against design intake. CP-328.

title: Decide+Investigate section drift validation
description: 6/6 /decide/* + /investigate/* routes pass drift validation. CP-329.

title: All v11 routes smoke-test post-restart
description: 24/24 routes smoke-tested after Phoenix restart — full Phase 4-5 ship gate. CP-330. apm-v4 HEAD 00bcedd.

title: Defect A doubled wordmark fix
description: sidebar_nav.ex brand header removed (canonical in top_bar.ex post-CP-210). Project switcher suppresses label when name matches brand. CP-331.

title: Defect B Skills badge fix
description: Badge tone always was badge-primary (blue); perceived red caused by daisyUI --color-primary unmapped. Resolved by CP-335. CP-332.

title: Defect C SESSIONS=0 fix
description: Stat tile now reads Apm.SessionManager.list_sessions/0 (disk-backed, real-time) instead of never-hydrated config array. CP-333.

title: Defect D Fleet empty fix
description: agent_panel.ex hardened with safe map-accessors agent[:field]; one malformed agent no longer crashes :for comprehension. CP-334.

title: Defect E sidebar dim fix
description: apm_tokens_aliases.css adds daisyUI compat tokens: --color-base-content, --color-primary, --color-base-* all map to --apm-*. CP-335.
